season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Cucumber performs well with timely nutrition, regular irrigation, and good pest management.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Vegetable nutrient requirement varies with season, spacing, and harvest duration.

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
micronutrients: Calcium, boron, or zinc based on deficiency symptoms

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Improve drainage and protect crop from foliar disease spread.
season_advice.dry_season: Use frequent light irrigation and mulching where possible.
season_advice.winter_season: Cool conditions favor many vegetables with reduced disease pressure.

application_section.title: Application Method
application_section.frequency: At planting and every 20–25 days during active growth

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Avoid wetting the root zone excessively

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Do not irrigate immediately after heavy rain

events.activity: Transplanting or sowing and basal dose
Top dressing and crop protection monitoring
